sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28832" key="dusdie/caktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσδι-έξακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28832.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to pass</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βίος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
